<?php /** * sect163r1 * * PHP version 5 and 7 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2017 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://pear.php.net/package/Math_BigInteger */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\Curves; use phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\BaseCurves\Binary; use phpseclib3\Math\BigInteger; class sect163r1 extends Binary { public function __construct() { $this->setModulo(163, 7, 6, 3, 0); $this->setCoefficients( '07B6882CAAEFA84F9554FF8428BD88E246D2782AE2', '0713612DCDDCB40AAB946BDA29CA91F73AF958AFD9' ); $this->setBasePoint( '0369979697AB43897789566789567F787A7876A654', '00435EDB42EFAFB2989D51FEFCE3C80988F41FF883' ); $this->setOrder(new BigInteger('03FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF48AAB689C29CA710279B', 16)); } }
